title: v0.6.0 release publication checklist

approvedWithOpenGates.decision: Publish v0.6.0 while keeping #255 open for participant evidence.

preTagChecks: Release PR merges to clean main.
Required CI checks pass on the release PR and clean main commit.
Static validation confirms release notes, successor snapshot, #255 checklist, and privacy flags.
Full local validation passes: pnpm lint && pnpm format-check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm chromium-smoke.
publicationSteps: Create annotated tag v0.6.0 from clean main after CI passes.
Generate web dist archive from tagged commit: speech-web-v0.6.0-dist.tar.gz.
Create GitHub release v0.6.0 with notes that preserve #255, ADR 0004, and ADR 0005 limitations.
Deploy or verify production Vercel URL for the tagged release commit.
Verify HTTPS app load, service worker registration, offline reload after first load, COOP/COEP/CSP/Permissions-Policy headers, update activation, and rollback instructions on production URL.
Close issue #258 only after GitHub release and deployment verification evidence are recorded.
Do not close issue #255 unless participant evidence or an explicit separate human decision updates that issue.
